parityMeta.describes: iOS-17e-4 loadFeedbackEngine parity — upsertLoadFeedback. Pins: insert into a session with no prior loadFeedback (no note); insert with a note; and replace an existing same-exercise entry while preserving a different-exercise entry, with the new entry appended at the END (mirrors {...session, loadFeedback: [...withoutCurrent, next]}). Each upsertProbe echoes the input session + the resulting loadFeedback array; the Swift port re-runs upsertLoadFeedback and asserts the array matches item-by-item. FUNCTION-LEVEL compute-assert on the Swift side.
